description_long: This apartment building complex features a blend of traditional and colonial architectural elements, with a prominent main block and several attached smaller structures. The facade is adorned with green railings, red and green window shutters, and a tiled roof with a slight overhang. The ground level includes multiple entrances, some with double doors, and the upper floors have balconies with decorative balustrades. The windows are symmetrically arranged, with a mix of rectangular and arched shapes, and the exterior is painted in a combination of cream, green, and red hues. The building sits on a paved stone courtyard, suggesting a communal or urban residential setting. The overall structure appears to be made primarily of concrete and masonry, with metal and glass elements for windows and railings.
description: A multi-story apartment building complex with traditional and colonial features, green railings, red and green shutters, and a tiled roof, set on a paved courtyard.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with symmetrical balconies, green railings, and multiple entrances at street level.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the depth of the main block and the attached smaller buildings, with visible window shutters and roof details.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the backs of the smaller attached buildings, each with its own set of balconies and windows.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the plain side walls of the main block and the grid-like window arrangement of the adjacent building.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in rows and columns, with consistent spacing and alignment across all visible facades. Some windows are grouped with shutters, while others are paired with balcony doors.
